videoSnippet.title: There He is! || Nepo vs Arjun || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Nepomniachtchi, Ian (2733) - Erigaisi Arjun (2761)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [06] 2026.06.12
B12 Caro-Kann, advance variation

1.e4 c6 2.d4 d5 3.e5 c5 4.Nf3 cxd4 5.Qxd4 Nc6 6.Qf4 g6 7.Nc3 d4 8.Bc4 Bf5 9.Ne2 Bh6 10.Qg3 Bxc2 11.O-O d3 12.Nf4 Nd4 13.Nxd4 Qxd4 14.Bxd3 Bxd3 15.Nxd3 Rd8 16.Rd1 Bxc1 17.Raxc1 Nh6 18.Qf3 O-O 19.Qxb7 Nf5 20.Qb4 Qd5 21.b3 Rc8 22.Rc5 Rxc5 23.Qxc5 Qe4 24.Qb4 Qd5 25.Qc4 Qa5 26.e6 f6 27.Nb4 Kg7 28.Rd7 Qe5 29.g3 h5 30.h4 a5 31.Nc6 Qe1+ 32.Kg2 Rc8 33.a3 Kf8 34.Rd3 Kg7 35.Rd7 Kf8 36.Rd3 Kg7 37.Rf3 Qd2 38.b4 axb4 39.axb4 Qd1 40.Qc5 Ra8 41.Nxe7 Nd4 42.Rxf6 Kxf6 43.Nd5+ Kxe6 44.Nf4+ Kf6 45.Qb6+ Ke5 46.Qc5+ Kf6 47.Qb6+ Ke5 48.Qc7+ Kf6 49.Qd6+ Kg7 50.Ne6+ Kg8 51.Ng5

00:30 Game Starts!
